mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bpm_category (id, name, code, description, status, sort, create_by, create_by_name, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now})
mapper.update: UPDATE bpm_category SET name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, sort = #{sort, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{loginUserId}, update_by_name = #{loginUserName}, update_time = #{now} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select id, name, code, description, status, sort, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time
from bpm_category where name = #{value} or code = #{value}

SELECT id, name, code, description, status, sort, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time FROM bpm_category WHERE code IN
#{code}
select id, name, code, description, status, sort, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time from bpm_category where id = #{id}

select id, name, code, description, status, sort, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time from bpm_category where 1=1
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND code LIKE '%' || #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
and status = #{status}
